zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Harrison于1534年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德。她和Sir Robert Bindloss至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1582年4月11日在英国英格兰藍卡爾卡福斯享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Harry or Herry + -son. These were the common pronunciations of Henry (see Harry ).

History: Harrison is an extremely common surname in northern England. One important and influential American family of bearers are descended from Benjamin Harrison, who emigrated from England to VA in 1633 or 1634. Descendants include another Benjamin Harrison (c. 1726–91), who was an activist in the American Revolution and a signer of the Declaration of Independence. His son William Henry Harrison (1773–1841) and great-grandson Benjamin Harrison (1833–1901) both became presidents of the US.

variants.name: Harry
meanings: English (mainly south Wales and southwestern England): from the medieval personal name Harry, a common form of Henry , with assimilation of -nr- to -rr- and regular Middle English change of -er- to -ar-. In south Wales the surname is generally a post-medieval coinage, in most cases not hereditary until the 18th or 19th century.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hariric, composed of the elements hari, heri ‘army’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Harry (see 1 above) as a surname.

variants.name: Arrizon
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably an altered form of English   Harrison  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Harrison was born in 1534, in Westmorland, England. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Robert Bindloss. She died on 11 April 1582, in Carnforth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Harrison est née en 1534, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Robert Bindloss. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1582, à Carnforth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Harrison wurde 1534 in Westmorland, England geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Bindloss mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. April 1582 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Carnforth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Harrison è nata il nel 1534 nel Westmorland, England. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Robert Bindloss. Morì il 11 aprile 1582, nel Carnforth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Harrison(은)는 1534년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Bindloss(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 카른포스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
